name: Generate Notifications After Doctor Approved - Medical Document Review Handoff

parameters.content:
## Generate Notifications After Doctor Approved

This workflow is converted from the uploaded customer support issue automation idea into an insurance medical review notification workflow.

Flow:
1. Doctor submits approved review decision
2. IF decision is Approved
3. Generate notifications for Support and Agent
4. Support receives client notification draft
5. Save audit record

Use this as Project 3B for Medical Document Review Handoff Automation.

## Set Credentials

After importing, set your own credentials for:
- Gmail / Email nodes
- Google Sheets node, if used

Replace demo emails:
- support@company.com
- agent@company.com

## Optional Google Sheets Mapping

Add a Google Sheets Append Row node after `Prepare Audit Record` and map:
- claim_reference_number
- client_name
- policy_number
- doctor_name
- doctor_review_decision
- support_notification_status
- agent_notification_status
- client_notification_draft_status
- next_action
- audit_note
- updated_at
